auto_fix.status: COMPLETE — 2 critical BUGS FIXED this run. graduated_rules loading bug patched. signal_pipeline penalize enforcement patched.

new_fixes_this_run.description: GraduatedRule(**r) failed for rules 6-8 due to extra metadata fields (_source, _evidence_source, _gate_percentage, _ab_cohort_start). List comprehension failure caused engine to silently load 0 rules. Fix: strip unknown fields before GraduatedRule(**filtered_dict). All 8 rules now load.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: hype_short_veto_v1, btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1, conf_floor_70_v1 had NEVER fired since being added. Confirmed via simulation: conf_floor_70_v1 correctly penalizes 65% -> 45%, hype_short_veto correctly vetos HYPE SELL.

new_fixes_this_run.description: Graduated rules penalize actions computed adjusted confidence (_gr_adj_conf) but never applied it back to signal.confidence. All penalize rules (conf_floor_70_v1, btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1, illiquid_regime_penalize_v1) were advisory-only no-ops. Fix: apply signal.confidence = max(0, min(100, _gr_adj_conf)) when adjustment > 0.5pts.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: On restart, conf_floor_70_v1 will reduce 60-70% signals to 40-50% confidence, likely failing win_prob_floor gate. btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1 will reduce BTC SHORT 70-80% to ~60% after net adjustment (boost +8 offset).
new_fixes_this_run.safety_note: Veto logic unchanged. Signal deep-copied before confidence modification. Exception handler at Gate 1g catches errors.
